data.title: Kartra Tutorial: Launch Your First Webinar Funnel Step-by-Step
data.excerpt: Learn how to set up a complete webinar sales funnel with Kartra. This step-by-step tutorial walks you through every click. Start building today.

$media.alt: Kartra Tutorial: Launch Your First Webinar Funnel Step-by-Step

children.text: *Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links. If you sign up through them, I may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.*
I've tested dozens of marketing tools over the past few years. Some do email well. Others nail funnel building. A handful handle webinars without making me want to throw my laptop out the window.
Kartra does all of it. Inside one login.

Built by Genesis Digital — the same team behind WebinarJam and EverWebinar — Kartra combines sales pages, email sequences, membership sites, checkout systems, and webinar hosting into a single platform. No more duct-taping five different subscriptions together and praying your integrations don't break at 2 AM before a launch.

In this tutorial, I'll walk you through setting up a complete webinar funnel inside Kartra, from zero to a live-ready system. Whether you're selling a course, coaching package, or software — this guide will get you there.
→ Try Kartra free for 14 days and build your first funnel this week
What You'll Need Before You Start
Before diving in, make sure you have these ready:
A Kartra account
— They offer a
14-day trial for $1
, so you can follow along risk-free.
A webinar topic and outline
— Even a rough idea works. You'll refine it inside the platform.
A lead magnet or offer
— Something valuable enough to exchange for an email address.
A payment processor
— Kartra integrates with Stripe, PayPal, Braintree, and Authorize.net natively.
That's it. No plugins. No Zapier workarounds. Kartra handles the rest.
If you're curious about what exactly Kartra includes at a foundational level, check out
this overview of what Kartra and WebinarJam are
Step 1: Set Up Your Kartra Account and Dashboard
After signing up, Kartra drops you into a clean dashboard. It's organized around core modules:
Pages
— Landing pages, sales pages, checkout pages
Products
— What you're selling
Leads
— Your contact database
Mail
— Email marketing and sequences
Memberships
— Gated content areas
Calendars
— Booking and scheduling
Helpdesks
— Customer support tickets
Webinars
— Live and evergreen webinar hosting

My advice: don't try to configure everything at once. Start with Pages and Products, then build outward. Kartra's left-hand sidebar makes navigation intuitive — each module opens in its own workspace so you're never lost.
One thing I love: the analytics dashboard gives you real-time data on page views, opt-ins, sales, and revenue without requiring Google Analytics or any third-party tracking setup.
Step 2: Build Your Registration Page
Navigate to
Pages → + New Page
and choose a template. Kartra includes hundreds of templates organized by purpose: opt-in pages, sales pages, thank-you pages, webinar registration pages.
For this tutorial, pick a
Webinar Registration template
. These templates are specifically designed with countdown timers, speaker bios, and benefit-driven copy blocks already laid out.
Here's what to customize:
Headline
— State the transformation your webinar delivers. Be specific. "How I Added $40K in Revenue with One Automated Funnel" beats "Free Webinar About Marketing" every single time.
Date and time
— Kartra lets you set multiple session times for different time zones. Use this feature. It increases attendance rates dramatically.
Registration form
— Collect name and email. Kartra automatically adds the contact to your Leads database and tags them based on the form they filled out.
Thank-you page
— After registration, redirect to a page that confirms the booking and includes a calendar add-to-calendar button.
Pro tip:
Kartra's built-in countdown timer is dynamic — it counts down to the actual webinar start time for each individual visitor based on their session selection. No third-party timer plugin needed.
Want more tips like this? Here's a collection of
Kartra tips and best practices
we've put together.
Step 3: Create Your Webinar Inside Kartra
Go to
Webinars → + New Webinar
. Kartra offers two main formats:
Live Webinars
Perfect for launches, Q&A sessions, and high-ticket sales presentations. You can:
Go live directly inside Kartra's platform
Share your screen and present slides
Interact with attendees via live chat
Run polls and display offers in real time
Automated (Evergreen) Webinars

Ideal for scaling. Once you record your best-performing live webinar, Kartra lets you replay it on a schedule — or let attendees watch "on demand" with simulated live elements like dynamic chat and timed offer reveals.

This combination of live and evergreen is something that makes Kartra's webinar capabilities genuinely powerful. You run a few live sessions, find your winning presentation, then let the automated version sell for you while you sleep.
Set up your webinar details:
Title and description
Presenter information
(Kartra supports multiple presenters)
Duration
Offer integration
— Connect the product you'll pitch during the webinar directly to a checkout button that appears at the right moment
→ Start your 14-day trial and set up your first Kartra webinar now
For real-world examples of how people use these features, browse these
Kartra use cases
Step 4: Build Your Email Follow-Up Sequence
This is where Kartra really separates itself from standalone webinar tools.
Navigate to
Mail → Sequences
and create a new sequence. You'll build a series of emails triggered by specific actions:
Immediately after registration
— Confirmation email with date, time, and calendar link.
24 hours before the webinar
— Reminder email with what they'll learn and a teaser.
1 hour before
— Short, punchy reminder. "We go live in 60 minutes."
Post-webinar (attended)
— Thank them, include the replay link, and pitch your offer.
Post-webinar (no-show)
— Different angle. "You missed something big — here's the replay."
3 days later
— Case study or testimonial email with urgency around the offer.
Kartra's visual sequence builder lets you drag and drop emails, set delays, add if/then branching logic, and tag contacts based on behavior — all without leaving the platform.

Here's a real-world example: I set up a 6-email sequence for a client's coaching program launch. Kartra tracked which contacts attended the webinar, which ones clicked the offer link, and which ones purchased. Contacts who attended but didn't buy automatically received a different follow-up path than those who registered but never showed up. All automated. Zero manual sorting.
Explore more about
why Kartra is worth choosing
for setups like this.
Step 5: Connect Your Checkout and Product
Go to
Products → + New Product
. Kartra's checkout system is surprisingly robust:
Single payment, payment plans, and subscriptions
— All built in.
Order bumps
— Add a one-click upsell right on the checkout page.
Upsell and downsell pages
— After purchase, Kartra can present additional offers in a sequence.
Coupon codes and trial periods
— Create scarcity and urgency without external tools.

Once your product is configured, link it to your webinar offer button. When attendees click "Buy Now" during or after the webinar, they're taken to a Kartra-hosted checkout page that processes payment and delivers access automatically.
If you're selling a membership or course, Kartra creates the member account, sends login credentials, and grants access to the appropriate content tier — all without you lifting a finger.
New and Featured Functions Worth Highlighting
Kartra continuously ships improvements. Here are features that stand out right now:
Smart automation branching
— Your sequences adapt in real time based on how leads interact with your emails, pages, and offers. No manual tagging required.
Advanced analytics per funnel step
— See exactly where people drop off and optimize each touchpoint.
Calendar booking integration
— Let webinar attendees book a consultation directly after watching, reducing friction to zero.
Built-in helpdesk
— Handle customer questions from the same platform where your funnel runs.
Drag-and-drop page builder improvements
— Faster loading, cleaner mobile rendering, and more template variety.
Funnel simulation tool
— Preview your entire customer journey before going live. Walk through every click, every redirect, every email trigger as if you were a real lead.
Stay current with the latest releases by checking our regularly updated post on
new Kartra features
Who Is Kartra Ideal For?
Kartra shines brightest for specific types of creators and businesses:
Course creators and coaches
who sell through webinars and need the entire funnel — registration, presentation, checkout, and delivery — in one place.
Small marketing teams
that can't afford to manage five separate SaaS subscriptions and the integrations between them.
Solopreneurs launching digital products
who want professional-grade funnels without hiring a developer.
Agencies managing client funnels
— Kartra allows multiple business profiles under one account.
Anyone tired of tool fatigue
— If you've ever lost a sale because your Zapier integration broke between your webinar tool and your email platform, Kartra eliminates that risk entirely.

At its price point ($119–$549/month depending on contacts and features), Kartra replaces the combined cost of a page builder, email tool, webinar platform, checkout system, membership plugin, and helpdesk — often for less money total.
If your work involves other project management tools alongside your marketing stack, you might also find our guides on
how to use ClickUp
how to use monday.com
, and
how to use Apollo.io
useful for keeping everything organized.
Quick-Start Checklist
Here's a condensed version of everything we covered:
1. ✅ Sign up for
Kartra's $1 trial
2. ✅ Choose a webinar registration template
3. ✅ Customize your headline, date/time options, and form
4. ✅ Create your live or automated webinar
5. ✅ Build a 5-6 email follow-up sequence with branching logic
6. ✅ Set up your product, checkout page, and upsell offers
7. ✅ Hit publish and start driving traffic
The entire setup can be completed in a single afternoon. I've done it in under three hours for a client who had their webinar content ready.

children.text: How much does Kartra cost?
Kartra pricing starts at $119/month for the Starter plan and goes up to $549/month for the Platinum plan. All plans include a 14-day trial for $1, so you can test every feature before committing.
Can I host live webinars directly inside Kartra?

Yes. Kartra includes a built-in live webinar feature where you can present slides, share your screen, interact with attendees through chat, run polls, and display timed offers — all within the platform.
Does Kartra replace tools like Mailchimp, ClickFunnels, and Zoom?

Kartra combines the functionality of email marketing platforms, funnel builders, webinar hosting, checkout systems, and membership site plugins into one tool. For many users, it fully replaces a stack of 4-6 separate subscriptions.
Is Kartra good for beginners with no technical experience?

Absolutely. Kartra uses drag-and-drop builders for pages, sequences, and webinars. Pre-built templates handle the design work, and the platform walks you through each setup step. You don't need coding or design skills.
